consoleMessages.text: react-i18next:: It seems you are still using the old wait option, you may migrate to the new useSuspense behaviour.

🥺 Seems like you're trying to call `fedopsLogger.appLoadStarted` and `fedopsLogger.appLoaded` in your controller.
We are already logging load events for SSR and CSR environments, so you can remove these calls from your project.
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 ()

The resource https://static.parastorage.com/services/communities-blog-ooi/1.3215.0/BlogViewerWidgetNoCss.bundle.min.js was preloaded using link preload but not used within a few seconds from the window's load event. Please make sure it has an appropriate `as` value and it is preloaded intentionally.
